# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Build a PHP page router that dynamically includes different page templates based on the URL parameter. Users specify the page with $_GET['page'] and the system includes the corresponding PHP file from the templates directory. Keep it simple and flexible for our multi-page website CMS.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

$templatesDir = __DIR__ . '/templates';
$defaultPage = 'home';

$page = $_GET['page'] ?? $defaultPage;
$page = trim((string)$page);
$page = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-\/]/', '', $page);
$page = trim($page, '/');

if ($page === '') {
    $page = $defaultPage;
}

$templateFile = $templatesDir . '/' . $page . '.php';
$realTemplatesDir = realpath($templatesDir);
$realTemplateFile = realpath($templateFile);

if ($realTemplatesDir === false) {
    http_response_code(500);
    exit('Templates directory not found.');
}

if ($realTemplateFile !== false && str_starts_with($realTemplateFile, $realTemplatesDir . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR) && is_file($realTemplateFile)) {
    include $realTemplateFile;
} else {
    $notFoundFile = $templatesDir . '/404.php';
    $realNotFoundFile = realpath($notFoundFile);

    if ($realNotFoundFile !== false && str_starts_with($realNotFoundFile, $realTemplatesDir . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR) && is_file($realNotFoundFile)) {
        http_response_code(404);
        include $realNotFoundFile;
    } else {
        http_response_code(404);
        echo 'Page not found.';
    }
}
